Title: Resident Evil Requiem: Complete Guide – Walkthrough, Puzzles, Parry & All Collectibles

URL Source: http://wccftech.com/how-to/resident-evil-requiem-complete-walkthough-and-guides-hub/

Published Time: 2026-02-27T12:09:00+00:00

Markdown Content:
_[**Resident Evil Requiem**](https://wccftech.com/roundup/resident-evil-requiem-everything-we-know-about-the-new-game-in-capcoms-beloved-horror-franchise/)_ is the latest entry in the survival horror series from CAPCOM, and the biggest shift for the franchise since the days of _[**Resident Evil 4**](https://wccftech.com/review/resident-evil-4/)_. While the game maintains the series' signature atmosphere and resource management, the introduction of a dual-narrative system featuring Grace Ashcroft and Leon S. Kennedy deeply changes gameplay, offering both **intense survival-horror sequences** focused on stealth and enemy avoidance, and **full-on action combat**.

In this **Complete Walkthrough and Guides Hub**, you will find everything you need to survive the horrors Grace and Leon will encounter as they face their past.

## Overview

[![Image 1: Grace in Resident Evil Requiem sits at a cluttered desk with monitors displaying databases and charts,](https://cdn.wccftech.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Resident-Evil-Requiem-Grace-scaled.jpg)](https://cdn.wccftech.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Resident-Evil-Requiem-Grace-scaled.jpg)

_Grace is one of the two protagonists in Resident Evil Requiem_

_Resident Evil Requiem_ is a hardcore survival-horror game which blends the gameplay styles of the survival horror-focused _[**Resident Evil 7 Biohazard**](https://wccftech.com/review/resident-evil-7-survival-horror-king/)_ with the full-on action experience of Resident Evil 4, in which players control **two protagonists** as they navigate a variety of different locations, including some iconic returning locations from previous entries in the series, solve puzzles and defeat enemies.

To help you get started, you can check out the following guides:

*   **[Best Tips for Beginners](https://wccftech.com/how-to/resident-evil-requiem-best-tips-for-beginners/)**
*   **[Best Camera Settings](https://wccftech.com/how-to/best-camera-settings-in-resident-evil-requiem-first-person-or-third-person/)**
*   **[Best Difficulty Setting](https://wccftech.com/how-to/best-difficulty-setting-in-resident-evil-requiem-for-a-first-playthrough)**

## Story Progression and Puzzles

[![Image 2: Resident Evil Requiem interface shows a fuse labeled 'ONE-TIME FUSE DNS-200' inside a panel, with an inventory displaying a screwdriver and](https://cdn.wccftech.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Resident-Evil-Requiem-Puzzles-scaled.jpg)](https://cdn.wccftech.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Resident-Evil-Requiem-Puzzles-scaled.jpg)

_Resident Evil Requiem is full of puzzles, as per the series' tradition_

Like previous entries in the series, _Resident Evil Requiem_ is a linear experience where you have to **explore** a variety of intricately designed locations filled with enemies to defeat and puzzles to solve. Still, these locations feature many **optional segments** that include additional items and resources that can make quite a big difference during the most intense fights.

### Rhodes Hill Care Center Puzzles

*   [**ARK Sterilization Chamber and Monitor Control Room Safes Codes**](https://wccftech.com/how-to/resident-evil-requiem-sterilization-chamber-and-monitor-control-room-safes-codes/)

## Combat And Stealth

[![Image 3: A detailed close-up of Leon S. Kennedy with shaggy hair and a fur collar from the game Resident Evil Requiem](https://cdn.wccftech.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Resident-Evil-Requiem-Leon-scaled.jpg)](https://cdn.wccftech.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Resident-Evil-Requiem-Leon-scaled.jpg)

_Leon is a force to be reckoned with in Resident Evil Requiem_

The most significant change in _Resident Evil_ _Requiem_ is the **combat flow** for the two protagonists. **Grace Ashcroft**, a fragile FBI investigator, must rely on **stealth** and careful picking of her fights as she tries to stay ahead of all sorts of mutated monsters. Meanwhile, the battle-hardened**Leon S. Kennedy has the skills and tools**to face these enemies head-on, his gameplay segments building on the mechanics seen in _Resident Evil 4_ and its remake.

### Mechanics

*   [**How to Parry and Master Leon's Combat**](https://wccftech.com/how-to/resident-evil-requiem-how-to-parry-and-master-leons-combat/)
*   **[How to Use Leon's Secret Finisher](https://wccftech.com/how-to/how-to-use-leons-secret-finisher-in-resident-evil-requiem/)**

### Bosses

*   [**How to Beat The Titan Spinner (Spider Boss)**](https://wccftech.com/how-to/how-to-beat-the-titan-spinner-spider-boss-in-resident-evil-requiem/)

## Character Progression

[![Image 4: A Resident Evil Requiem inventory screen shows the B934 pistol with specs such as 'Rate of Fire,' 'Reload Speed,' and 'Ammo Capacity: 7'](https://cdn.wccftech.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Resident-Evil-Requiem-Gun-scaled.jpg)](https://cdn.wccftech.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Resident-Evil-Requiem-Gun-scaled.jpg)

_Items are at the core of the Resident Evil Requiem progression system_

In true survival-horror fashion, **character progression** in _Resident Evil Requiem_ is tied to the item system. Both Grace and Leon can find items as they explore different locations to improve their item carrying capacity, firepower, and, in Grace's case, health and shooting abilities.

### Upgrades

*   [**How to Use Antique Coins To Get Critical Early Upgrades**](https://wccftech.com/how-to/how-to-use-antique-coins-to-get-critical-early-upgrades-in-resident-evil-requiem/)

## Crafting System

[![Image 5: A game screen from Resident Evil Requiem showing the player crafting a 'Makeshift Knife' with 2/2 materials, along with other](https://cdn.wccftech.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Resident-Evil-Requiem-Crafting-728x410.jpg)](https://cdn.wccftech.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Resident-Evil-Requiem-Crafting-scaled.jpg)

_Resident Evil Requiem features an extensive crafting system_

_Resident Evil Requiem_ features a **crafting system** that allows Grace and Leon to use resources to craft useful items such as additional ammo, healing injectors, and more. To unlock more crafting recipes, however, you will need to use Blood Specimen and analyze them by completing simple puzzles governed by some special rules.

## Special Content

[![Image 6: A Resident Evil Requiem menu from 'Special Content' shows the 'Matilda IMP (Leon)' handgun available for purchase for '500 CP,' with a](https://cdn.wccftech.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Resident-Evil-Requiem-Special-Content-scaled.jpg)](https://cdn.wccftech.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Resident-Evil-Requiem-Special-Content-scaled.jpg)

_Resident Evil Requiem features a vast selection of unlockable Special Content_

In true series fashion, _Resident Evil Requiem_ features plenty of **special content** ranging from new weapons and charms with passive skills to costumes, concept art, and 3D models that can be unlocked by either spending Completion Points, obtained by clearing in-game challenges, finding certain collectibles, and more

### Cosmetics

*   [**How to Unlock All Costumes**](https://wccftech.com/how-to/how-to-unlock-all-costumes-in-resident-evil-requiem/)

## Review

_Is the game worth your time and money?_

In case you are still on the fence, check out our **[_Resident Evil Requiem_ review](https://wccftech.com/review/resident-evil-requiem-encyclopedia-evil/)** to learn if this is a game worth your money and time. If you're playing the game on PC, check out our [**Performance Analysis and Tuning guide**](https://wccftech.com/how-to/resident-evil-requiem-pc-performance-analysis-tuning-guide/) for the best graphics settings.

**_All guides are based on a full playthrough completed at the Standard (Classic) difficulty in the Steam 1.0 version. Screenshots captured from the same version._**

**About the [author](https://wccftech.com/author/francesco/):** Francesco De Meo has been covering video games and technology since 2012, starting his career at small outlets like Gamersyndrome and GeekSnack. After joining Wccftech [gaming](https://wccftech.com/topic/games/) section in 2015, he quickly expanded his video gaming coverage with in-depth reporting, interviews with iconic industry figures such as Grasshopper Manufacture founder and No More Heroes creator Goichi "Suda51" Suda, Resident Evil series creator Shinji Mikami, Team NINJA's president and Nioh series director Fumihiko Yasuda, and Silent Hill creator Keiichiro Toyama, reviews and on-the-ground coverage of major industry events such as Gamescom and E3. When he's not reporting or reviewing, Francesco can be found playing the genres he loves most, spending time with his six cats, reading, writing music, playing guitar and drumming for his progressive rock band.
